description: Internal namespace patterns. The AI flags any public package matching these patterns since they likely shadow internal packages.

namespaces.description: Replace 'yourco' with your organization's npm scope and ensure .npmrc routes the scope to the internal registry
Replace with your organization's Java group ID
Replace with your organization's PyPI prefix; configure pip.conf with --extra-index-url
Replace with your organization's Go module path; use GOPRIVATE env var
